Method–provenance block:
• Property: frontier orbital energies and HOMO–LUMO gap (eV).
• Level of theory: DFT, tier ‘standard’ (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, RI) with PySCF backend.
• Geometry provenance: single-point on the supplied O₂ geometry (/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/oxygen/oxygen.xyz); no further optimization (DFT//input-xyz).
• Environment: gas phase (no implicit solvent).
• Charge = 0; multiplicity = 3 (UKS open-shell triplet).
• Software/version: PySCF (invoked via chemkit frontier-orbitals skill).
• Convergence: SCF converged in 7 cycles.
• Warnings: no warnings reported by the engine.
• Live .out log was streamed to the working directory during execution (path announced at launch); JSON result saved to /tmp/oxygen_frontier_orbitals.json.

Headline numerical result (gas phase, B3LYP/def2-TZVP):
HOMO-LUMO gap = 5.288058566348104 eV.

All numbers are reported exactly as returned by the chemkit calculation; provenance = computed.
